title: PFC Joseph P. Dwyer Peer Support Program Act
short_title: PFC Joseph P. Dwyer Peer Support Program Act
stage_label: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
crs_summary: PFC Joseph P. Dwyer Peer Support Program Act This bill requires the Department of Veterans Affairs (VA) to establish the PFC Joseph P. Dwyer Peer Support Program to make grants to eligible entities for peer-to-peer mental health programs for veterans. Eligible entities include (1) a nonprofit organization that has historically served the mental health needs of veterans; (2) a congressionally chartered veteran service organization; or (3) a state, local, or tribal veteran service agency, director, or commissioner. The VA shall establish an advisory committee to create appropriate program standards.
last_action_text: Referred to the Subcommittee on Health.
